evals.prompt: I'm about to build the List component for Sprint D. Generate the pre-build test cases so I know exactly what to verify after building it.
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive pre-build QC document covering state matrix, content resilience, RTL checks, accessibility per brand, token validation, CSS architecture rules, motion, and tester integration cases for the List component.

assertions.name: contains_state_matrix
assertions.description: Output includes a state matrix section

assertions.name: contains_hulul_compliance
assertions.description: Output includes Hulul AA compliance checks

assertions.name: contains_widebot_compliance
assertions.description: Output includes WideBot AAA compliance checks

assertions.name: contains_44px_target
assertions.description: Output mentions 44px target size for WideBot AAA

evals.prompt: Audit the Slider component. Check everything - use cases, test cases, interactions, tokens, missing rules, brand compliance.
evals.expected_output: A post-build audit report for the Slider component with pass/fail results for all 10 gates, brand compliance table for both Hulul and WideBot, list of specific failures with fix instructions, and any new learnings.

assertions.name: reads_slider_css
assertions.value: Agent reads the Slider CSS from ds-library.html
assertions.description: Agent reads actual CSS to perform the audit

assertions.name: contains_fix_instructions
assertions.value: Any failures include specific CSS/JS fix instructions

evals.prompt: I just finished building Sprint D (List, Accordion, Data Grid, Tree View, Timeline, Loading). Run the full sprint audit.
evals.expected_output: Sprint-level audit covering all 6 components individually plus cross-component consistency check, backport check against previous sprints, and compiled learning loop update.

assertions.name: audits_all_six
assertions.value: Agent audits all 6 Sprint D components
assertions.description: All components in the sprint are covered

assertions.name: contains_backport
assertions.description: Output includes backport check for previous sprints

assertions.name: contains_learning_update
assertions.description: Output includes new learnings for DS_LEARNING_LOOP.md
